prompt: We always do a consistency pass after renames, then update NOTES.md, then check for stale references. Can you make that a discipline?

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md contains a new discipline block with numbered steps
Discipline block has a breadcrumb comment
Discipline covers all three steps: consistency pass, NOTES.md update, stale reference check
FEEDBACK_FOO.md FOO_1 is marked resolved or cross-referenced
